title: Looking for Teacher at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
